title: rosa viscaria var. lemanii
intro: Rosa viscaria var. lemanii, also known as the Alpine sweet rose or rose of the alps, is a fragrant, pink-flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Rosa viscaria var. lemanii include its ability to act as a mild antiseptic and astringent, making it useful for soothing skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing, as well as its ability to help alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. Rosa viscaria var. lemanii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
